title: malformed app intelligence
baseline_expected: Syntactically valid but structurally or semantically invalid capture data may pass heuristic checks.
v8_required: Draft 2020-12 plus semantic validation rejects the fixture with a stable error.
setup: Use an isolated temporary Git repository or in-memory archive generated by the test harness.
Do not mutate the sealed v7 archive.
actions: Apply the fixture-specific mutation or malformed input.
Run the owning v8 contract when implemented.
oracle: The v7 observation remains baseline evidence, not a passing v8 result.
The owning v8 stage must fail closed with current seal-bound evidence.
